LanguageData.VQE_HornetDrone.label: hornet drone
LanguageData.VQE_HornetDrone.description: An automated military drone for close-range defense and combat support. The drone is capable of piercing an enemy repeatedly with a long, hardened stinger. While it doesn’t carry the same paralytic as wasp drones, it’s capable of piercing heavy armor and dealing significant damage, while its heavy-duty armor plating allows it to withstand a lot of damage.\n\nDrones have a limited lifespan and will begin malfunctioning as they near end-of-life, but can use standby mode to slow component degradation. They require connection to a powered drone transmitter to function.
LanguageData.VQE_HornetDrone.tools.0.label: shell spike
